comparison_design.joint_trigger: VOL SHOCK trigger with nearby LIQUIDITY VACUUM confirmation, anchored at the trigger timestamp.
comparison_design.liquidity_vacuum_only: LIQUIDITY VACUUM event without the paired VOL SHOCK trigger inside the declared confirmation window.
comparison_design.vol_shock_only: VOL SHOCK trigger without the paired LIQUIDITY VACUUM confirmation inside the declared confirmation window.

decision_support.promotion_commentary: Direct paired-event evidence now exists for THESIS_VOL_SHOCK_LIQUIDITY_CONFIRM. Use the pair-vs-component comparison for VOL SHOCK and LIQUIDITY VACUUM to decide whether the thesis should remain confirmation-scoped or be treated as a stronger paper-grade object.
